records.recognition: A rectangular red board with a white border.
records.meaning: Stop. The track is closed or obstructed beyond this point.
playerAction: Do not pass unless the operating situation explicitly authorises it.

records.recognition: A white semicircular board with a black border and the words Halt für Rangierfahrten.
records.meaning: Shunting movements must not pass this point.
playerAction: Stop the shunting movement before the board.
Do not treat it as a general stop point for ordinary train movements unless other rules or signals also require this.

records.recognition: A black rectangular or square board showing a white horizontal bar.
notes: Physical form and mounting vary; direct TSW route observations are still required.

records.recognition: A black board showing a white diagonal bar rising to the right.
playerAction: Proceed only as a shunting movement and remain able to stop short of obstacles or vehicles.
notes: Physical form and mounting vary; direct TSW route observations are still required.

sources.title: Eisenbahn-Signalordnung and DB Signalbuch signal families
